---
title: "Project Title"
author:
  - "Group Member 1"
  - "Group Member 2"
  - "Group Member 3"
date: today
---

## Introduction

<!-- Motivate the dataset and research questions. -->

## Data

<!-- Brief description of the dataset. -->

## Results

<!-- Summary of key findings. -->

## Discussion

<!-- Interpret results, limitations, and next steps. -->
